entity_types.name: organization
entity_types.description: Any organized group: company, nonprofit, team, institution.

entity_types.name: technology
entity_types.description: A technology, framework, language, protocol, or platform.

entity_types.name: product
entity_types.description: A named product or service offered by an organization.

entity_types.name: project
entity_types.description: A bounded initiative or body of work.

entity_types.name: concept
entity_types.description: An abstract idea, methodology, or domain concept.

entity_types.name: event
entity_types.description: Something that happened or will happen at a point/range in time.

entity_types.name: document
entity_types.description: A document, article, spec, or other written artifact.

relationship_types.name: owns
relationship_types.description: Ownership of an asset, product, or organization.

relationship_types.name: develops
relationship_types.description: Organization builds/maintains the product or technology.

relationship_types.name: created_by
relationship_types.description: Artifact created by a person or organization.

relationship_types.name: mentioned_in
relationship_types.description: Entity referenced in a document or event.

relationship_types.name: interested_in
relationship_types.description: Topic or entity the source is tracking or curious about.
